models.name: Mistral Small 4
models.description: Updated small Mistral model for low-latency chat, tool use, and coding workloads

changelog.description: Mistral Small 4 released as the latest cost-efficient Small family model with 256K context
Pricing set at $0.15 per 1M input tokens and $0.45 per 1M output tokens
